title: Test Subject #C{Count}

moves.title: Respawn
effects: Gain additional head and scale up

move_pattern: Cycles through three distinct phases triggered by respawns via Adaptable Power. Phase 1: Alternates Bite and Skull Bash. Dies → Respawn (2-headed). Phase 2: Alternates Pounce and Multi-Claw. Dies → Respawn (3-headed). Phase 3: Cycles Lacerate → Big Pounce → Burning Growl repeatedly. Cannot respawn again.
notes: Complex three-phase boss. Respawns twice via Adaptable Power when reduced to 0 HP: first respawn grants Painful Stabs power, second respawn grants Nemesis and removes both Adaptable and Painful Stabs powers. HP scales with player count during respawn (base form × number of players). Multi-Claw's hit count increases by 1 each turn starting at 3 hits. Upon second respawn, gains ShouldDisappearFromDoom status preventing Doom ascension modifier from affecting it.
